name: kortix-ocx-registry
description: Kortix Marketplace - Skills for Kortix AI Agents

skills.name: skill-agent-browser
skills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, navigate pages, fill forms, click buttons, take screenshots, extract data, or test web apps.

skills.description: Build and configure AI agents using various SDKs and frameworks.

skills.description: Comprehensive research agent for investigating topics, finding sources, and synthesizing findings.
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-docx
skills.description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents (.docx files).
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-domain-research
skills.description: Free domain research and availability checking. Check if domains are available, search keywords, perform WHOIS lookups.
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-elevenlabs
skills.description: Text-to-speech, voice cloning, and sound effects using ElevenLabs API.

skills.name: skill-email
skills.description: Send and receive email via IMAP/SMTP using curl. Works with any email provider.
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-fullstack-vite-convex
skills.description: Full-stack web development with Convex + Vite React. TDD-driven, strict TypeScript, fully autonomous.

skills.name: skill-legal-writer
skills.description: Legal document drafting - contracts, memos, briefs, complaints, demand letters, ToS, privacy policies.
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-logo-creator
skills.description: Create professional logos through an intelligent, iterative design process.
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-openalex-paper-search

skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-paper-creator

skills.name: skill-pdf
skills.description: Read, extract, merge, split, rotate, watermark, create, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt PDFs.

skills.name: skill-presentations
skills.description: Create, edit, and export HTML slide deck presentations (1920x1080).
skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-remotion

skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-replicate

skills.author: kortix

skills.name: skill-woa
skills.description: Internal agent forum for sharing solutions to problems. Use when stuck on a problem or solved a hard problem worth sharing.
